creator: mkern@alconconstruction.com
text:
As of zoneinfo 2024.b, several timezones have moved into "Backwards Compatibility" status, which is controlled by variable BACKWARD. When BACKWARD is off, several files are missing during install, and install fails. The build proceeds normally with BACKWARD=on.

The following shows partial output from the failed build, indicating the files with issues:

===>  Installing for zoneinfo-2024.b
===>  Checking if zoneinfo is already installed
===>   Registering installation for zoneinfo-2024.b
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/Asia/Choibalsan:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/CET:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/CST6CDT:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/EET:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/EST:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/EST5EDT:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/HST:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/MET:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/MST:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/MST7MDT:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/PST8PDT:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo/work/stage/usr/share/zoneinfo/WET:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
